hero.heading: Your guitar deserves expert hands
hero.lead: From a simple setup to a full custom build — I give every instrument the care and attention it deserves.

about.heading: Since 1993
paragraphs: Stringed instrument repairer and luthier since 1993 based in North Shields. City of Leeds College of Music qualified, and have worked with touring bands, recording studios, schools, and retailers including JG Windows and PMT.
Professional work at sensible prices, on everything from guitars to sitars.

finalCta.heading: Ready to get started?
finalCta.lead: Tell me about your instrument and what it needs.

hero.heading: What I do
hero.lead: All prices are starting points. I'll give you an exact quote once I've assessed your instrument.

hero.heading: Get a quote
hero.lead: Tell me about your instrument via phone, email or Instagram.

footerBlurb: Stringed instrument repair, based in North Shields. Professional work at sensible prices.
